insights.pattern: 4 trades failed due to wrong direction. Momentum signal is not reliable enough alone.
insights.action: Require UOA flow confirmation before entering momentum-only trades. Add volume-weighted direction ch

rationale: Conservative refinement focusing on the dominant failure mode (wrong_direction: 44% of trades). The 22.2% win rate indicates systematic issues with signal quality. Primary focus is strengthening flow confirmation requirements and raising quality thresholds rather than dramatic weight changes.
